response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified performers as SSholox members (La+ Darknesss, Takane Lui, Hakui Koyori, 沙花叉クロヱ, 風真いろは) based on appearance. 2. 00:00-00:40: Identified as introductory talk. 3. 00:40-05:00: Song '迷宮なラビリンス' starts. 4. Confirmed song title and composer 'ハヤシベトモノリ' from on-screen text at 02:26. 5. Searched '迷宮なラビリンス ハヤシベトモノリ 歌詞' to confirm details. Used the known lyrics for this Hololive original song.
response.global_summary: A video featuring an introductory greeting by members of the Hololive group SSholox, followed by a full 3D vocal performance of their original song '迷宮なラビリンス' (Labyrinthine Labyrinth).

scenes.description: Members of the Hololive group SSholox (La+ Darknesss, Takane Lui, Hakui Koyori, 沙花叉クロヱ, 風真いろは) are shown in a short introductory segment, talking to the audience. No vocal music is playing.
scenes.performer_in_video: SSholox (La+ Darknesss, Takane Lui, Hakui Koyori, 沙花叉クロヱ, 風真いろは)

scenes.description: The performance of the original song '迷宮なラビリンス' begins. The performers sing and perform a choreographed dance in a 3D stadium setting. Text on screen identifies the song title and the composer, Tomonori Hayashi.
scenes.performer_in_video: SSholox (La+ Darknesss, Takane Lui, Hakui Koyori, 沙花叉クロヱ, 風真いろは)
